languages.text: {n}Ферренц сгибается под {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}тяжестью вашего взгляда{/d}. С заметным усилием разорвав зрительный контакт, генетор судорожно встряхивает головой, будто пытаясь избавиться от наваждения. Когда он заговаривает вновь, голос его звучит непривычно смиренно.{/n} "Как прикажете, Лорд-капитан". {n}Техножрец принимает аугмент дрожащими руками.{/n} "Технология будет доведена до предельно допустимой эффективности".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ферренц сгибается под тяжестью вашего взгляда. С заметным усилием разорвав зрительный контакт, генетор судорожно встряхивает головой, будто пытаясь избавиться от наваждения. Когда он заговаривает вновь, голос его звучит непривычно смиренно{/n} "Как прикажете, Лорд-капитан". {n}Техножрец принимает аугмент дрожащими руками.{/n} "Технология будет доведена до предельно допустимой эффективности".

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

{n}Ferrenz stoops under the crushing weight of your gaze. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you say, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum permissible efficiency."

{n}Ferrenz wilts under the crushing weight of your gaze. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

{n}Ferrenz wilts under the crushing weight of your gaze. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

languages.text: {n}费伦茨在{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}你沉重目光的压迫下{/d}退缩了。基因士艰难地移开视线，接着抽搐般地摇了摇头，仿佛在驱散某种挥之不去的幻象。当他再次开口时，声音莫名变得卑微起来。{/n}“遵命，舰长大人。”{n}技术神甫用颤抖的双手接过那植入物。{/n}“此技术将被优化，直至它所能达到的极限效率。”
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

traits.locale_text: {n}费伦茨在{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}你沉重目光的压迫下{/d}退缩了。基因士艰难地移开视线，接着抽搐般地摇了摇头，仿佛在驱散某种挥之不去的幻象。当他再次开口时，声音莫名变得卑微起来。{/n}“遵命，舰长大人。”{n}技术神甫用颤抖的双手接过那植入物。{/n}“此技术将被优化，直至它所能达到的极限效率。”

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz se encoge ante el {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}inclemente peso de tu mirada{/d} y, haciendo un esfuerzo visible por evitarla, menea la cabeza enérgicamente como si intentase apartar una espantosa visión de su mente. Cuando por fin vuelve a hablar, su voz suena curiosamente sumisa.{/n} «Como usted ordene, Lord Capitán». {n}El tecnosacerdote toma el aumento con manos temblorosas.{/n} «La tecnología será optimizada hasta su máxima eficacia posible».
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz se encoge ante el {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}inclemente peso de tu mirada{/d} y, haciendo un esfuerzo visible por evitarla, menea la cabeza enérgicamente como si intentase apartar una espantosa visión de su mente. Cuando por fin vuelve a hablar, su voz suena curiosamente sumisa.{/n} «Como usted ordene, Lord Capitán». {n}El tecnosacerdote toma el aumento con manos temblorosas.{/n} «La tecnología será optimizada hasta su máxima eficacia posible».

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz cède, incapable de {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}soutenir le poids écrasant de votre regard{/d}. Le genetor baisse les yeux avec un effort visible et secoue la tête d'un mouvement convulsif, comme s'il cherchait à chasser un trouble. Lorsqu'il reprend la parole, son ton s'est étrangement radouci.{/n} « À vos ordres, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Le technoprêtre prend l'augmentation dans ses mains tremblantes.{/n} « Cette technologie sera améliorée jusqu'à son niveau d'efficacité maximal. »
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz cède, incapable de {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}soutenir le poids écrasant de votre regard{/d}. Le genetor baisse les yeux avec un effort visible et secoue la tête d'un mouvement convulsif, comme s'il cherchait à chasser un trouble. Lorsqu'il reprend la parole, son ton s'est étrangement radouci.{/n} « À vos ordres, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Le technoprêtre prend l'augmentation dans ses mains tremblantes.{/n} « Cette technologie sera améliorée jusqu'à son niveau d'efficacité maximal. »

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz erschlafft unter der {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}Last deines Blickes{/d}. Der Genetor wendet sich mit sichtlicher Mühe von dir ab und schüttelt krampfartig den Kopf, als wolle er sich von einer quälenden Vision befreien. Als er erneut das Wort erhebt, klingt er seltsam demütig.{/n} "Wie Ihr befehlt, Lord Captain." {n}Der Techpriester nimmt die Augmentation mit zitternden Händen entgegen.{/n} "Die Technologie wird auf ihre maximal mögliche Effizienz verfeinert werden."
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz erschlafft unter der {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}Last deines Blickes{/d}. Der Genetor wendet sich mit sichtlicher Mühe von dir ab und schüttelt krampfartig den Kopf, als wolle er sich von einer quälenden Vision befreien. Als er erneut das Wort erhebt, klingt er seltsam demütig.{/n} "Wie Ihr befehlt, Lord Captain." {n}Der Techpriester nimmt die Augmentation mit zitternden Händen entgegen.{/n} "Die Technologie wird auf ihre maximal mögliche Effizienz verfeinert werden."

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}bakışlarının ezici ağırlığı{/d} altında siniyor. Göz temasını görünür bir çabayla kesen Genetör, sanki musallat olan bir vizyonu dağıtmak istercesine başını sarsıntılı şekilde sallıyor. Tekrar konuştuğundaysa sesi garip bir şekilde mahcup geliyor.{/n} "Nasıl emrederseniz Lord Kaptan." {n}Tekno Rahip, titreyen elleriyle ogmenti kabul ediyor.{/n} "Teknoloji, olası en yüksek verimliliğe göre rafine edilecektir."
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}bakışlarının ezici ağırlığı{/d} altında siniyor. Göz temasını görünür bir çabayla kesen Genetör, sanki musallat olan bir vizyonu dağıtmak istercesine başını sarsıntılı şekilde sallıyor. Tekrar konuştuğundaysa sesi garip bir şekilde mahcup geliyor.{/n} "Nasıl emrederseniz Lord Kaptan." {n}Tekno Rahip, titreyen elleriyle ogmenti kabul ediyor.{/n} "Teknoloji, olası en yüksek verimliliğe göre rafine edilecektir."

languages.text: {n}フェレンツは{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}あなたの視線に圧倒され{/d}、萎びてしまった。目線を無理に逸らしたジェネターは、まるで追いかけてくる幻影を払いのけるように、首を激しく振る。そして再び口を開くと、彼の声は奇妙なほど謙虚なものになった。{/n}「お命しだい、艦長様。」{n}テクプリストは震える手で増幅器を受け取る。{/n}「この技術は、可能な限り最高の効率に研ぎ澄まされるでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz wilts under the {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}crushing weight of your gaze{/d}. Breaking eye contact with visible effort, the Genetor shakes his head convulsively, as if to dispel a haunting vision. When he speaks again, his voice sounds strangely humbled.{/n} "As you command, Lord Captain." {n}The Tech-Priest accepts the augment with trembling hands.{/n} "The technology will be refined to its maximum possible efficiency."

traits.locale_text: {n}フェレンツは{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_DH_Signs}あなたの視線に圧倒され{/d}、萎びてしまった。目線を無理に逸らしたジェネターは、まるで追いかけてくる幻影を払いのけるように、首を激しく振る。そして再び口を開くと、彼の声は奇妙なほど謙虚なものになった。{/n}「お命しだい、艦長様。」{n}テクプリストは震える手で増幅器を受け取る。{/n}「この技術は、可能な限り最高の効率に研ぎ澄まされるでしょう。」
